title: Find Biased Features
text: BiasDetect R package available Bioconductor version 3.19 later. can install BiasDetect using following commands R session Bioconductor: Additionally, can install development version GitHub: Install additional required packages running package codes vignettes.
code: if (!require("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))     install.packages("BiocManager")  BiocManager::install("BiasDetect")  ## Check Bioconductor installation BiocManager::valid() BiocManager::install("christinehou11/BiasDetect") pkgs <- c("dplyr", "tidyr") required_pkgs <- pkgs[!pkgs %in% rownames(installed.packages())] BiocManager::install(required_pkgs)
